name: LSP4IJ
description:
LSP4IJ is a free and open-source

  • Language Server protocol (LSP) client compatible with all flavours of IntelliJ.
  • Debug Adapter Protocol support with Debug Adapter Protocol Run/Debug configuration.

It allows you to integrate any language server that communicates with its client via stdio:

  • by developing an IntelliJ plugin with LSP extension points:
    • com.redhat.devtools.lsp4ij.server extension point to define a language server.
    • com.redhat.devtools.lsp4ij.languageMapping to associate an IntelliJ language with a language server definition.
  • by manually adding language server definitions, supporting custom server settings. This approach doesn't require developing a specific IntelliJ plugin.

LSP4IJ also provides:

  • an LSP Consoles view to tracks LSP requests, responses and notifications in a console:

If you select the language server node, you can configure it the same way as in the Language Servers preferences page

and use the left toolbar to Apply or Reset the settings.

  • a Language Servers preferences page to configure the LSP trace level, the debug port to use to debug language server:

You can find more documentation in:

  • the developer guide, providing step-by-step instructions on how to integrate a language server in LSP4J in an external IntelliJ plugin.
  • the User-defined language server documentation, explaining how to integrate a language server in LSP4J with few settings.
  • the user guide, which explains how to use LSP console and Language Server preferences.
  • the LSP Support overview, describing which LSP features are implemented, and how.
notes:
0.17.0

  • Improved language server lifecycle management (start/stop/restart) to prevent unexpected errors
  • Fixed various bugs and improved stability for LSP and DAP
See the full list of changes in the changelog.

0.16.1

  • fix Hit CancellationException when using "Shift+Shift" (Search Everywhere)
  • fix DAPDebuggerEvaluator.getExpressionInfoAtOffsetAsync must not return null
Learn more in the changelog.

0.16.0

  • DAP support for Disassembly
  • Various bug fixes and stability improvements for LSP and DAP
Learn more in the changelog.

0.15.0

  • Improved DAP support: added runInTerminal and thread panels
  • DAP API enhancements: customize breakpoint types and settings editors
  • Various bug fixes and stability improvements
Learn more in the changelog.

0.14.2

  • Fix bug to show the “Install Server” notification only for TextMate and PlainText files.
  • Add jq-lsp user defined language server.
  • Add terraform-ls user defined language server.
Learn more in the changelog.

0.14.1

  • Show the “Install Server” notification only for TextMate and PlainText files.
  • Install language servers via npm in node_modules.
Learn more in the changelog.

0.14.0

  • Support for declarative installers for Language Servers and Debug Adapters — Learn more
  • Display installation status and provide install actions directly in the LSP Explorer
  • New API: LanguageServerSettingsContributor to allow IntelliJ plugins to contribute custom UI settings — See usage
  • New language server templates: Ada, Astro, Camel, Clangd, Dart, Luau, Ruby, SDL, and Svelte
  • New debug adapter template: CodeLLDB
  • Performance improvements for workspace symbol resolution
  • Various bug fixes and stability enhancements
Learn more in the changelog.

0.13.0

  • Report problem in the project view
  • Improved IntelliJ startup performance by launching the language server only for visible editors
  • Performance improvements for diagnostics
  • Hide Semantic Tokens Inspector from toolbar
  • Support for conditional / exception DAP breakpoints
  • Fixing bugs
Learn more in the changelog.

0.12.0

  • Support for textDocument/diagnostic (Pull diagnostic)
  • Support for 'Inspect Code...' to show diagnostics from opened/closed files
  • Support for breadcrumbs/sticky lines based on LSP DocumentSymbol
  • Resolve CodeLens only for visible view port
  • Performance improvements for LSP inlay hints, code lenses and semantic tokens
  • Fixing bugs
Learn more in the changelog.

0.11.0

  • Performance improvements for LSP inlay hints
  • Performance improvements for LSP semantic tokens
  • Enhanced TextMate editing experience
  • Language Server Installer API introduced
  • Improved Debug DAP support, now with "attach" functionality for supporting Python - Debugpy
  • New (experimental) changelog.

    0.10.0

    • Debug Adapter Protocol support
    • LSP textDocument/onTypeFormatting support
    • On type formating client side, based on LSP selectionRanges / foldingRange
    • LSP Inlay Hints improvement by adopting no deprecated codeInsight.declarativeInlayProviderFactory extension point.
    • LSP API to customize file URI
    • LSP API to customize LSP progress
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.9.0

    • Support for Selection Range
    • Use standard menu Implementation(s) (Ctrl+Alt+B) to execute Implementation
    • Use standard menu Type Declaration (Ctrl+Shift+B) to execute Type definition
    • LSP code folding improvements for braced blocks and code block provider implementation based on that same information
    • Show workspace symbols with Class, Struct, Type kind in the standard Class tab (Ctrl+N)
    • Provide completion, validation, etc for configuring user-defined language servers based on JSON Schema
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.8.1

    • Remove using internal API ProjectIndexingActivityHistoryListener
    • JSON support for configuring user-defined language servers
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.8.0

    • Support for Call Hierarchy
    • Support for Type Hierarchy
    • Starting the language servers after all projects are indexed to ensure very good performance of the IntelliJ startup
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.7.0

    • Support for documentSelector in registerCapability
    • Provide the LSP client features API
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.6.0

    • Support for textDocument/documentSymbol
    • Provide a new way to connect to a language server with OSProcessStreamConnectionProvider
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.5.0

    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.4.0

    • Support for workspace/symbol
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.3.0

    • Support for textDocument/semanticTokens
    • Support file link in hover
    • Improve performance
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.0.2

    • Provide an API to enable/disable & start/stop language server
    • Support for syntax coloration for Markdown code block and indented blockquote on hover, completion documentation.
    • Support 'deprecated'/'unnecessary' diagnostic tags
    • Support for LSP 'workspace/configuration'
    • Support for triggered chars in LSP completion support
    • Support for labelDetails in completion
    • Display platform file icons on completion
    • Provides menu for LSP implementation/references/declaration/type definition
    • Export user defined language server
    • Support Macros in the start LS command
    • Improve performance
    • Fixing bugs
    Learn more in the changelog.

    0.0.1

    • Initial release
    Learn more in the changelog.
